title: JEI Bookmark Sync
description: Sync your JEI bookmarks across all your computers by uploading them to your server!
body:
# JEI Bookmark Sync
## Sync your JEI bookmarks across all your computers!

If you play on different computers then this is the mod for you. Your JEI bookmarks are stored locally, so every time you switch computers, all your bookmarks are gone. So JEI Bookmark Sync saves your bookmarks on the server. Log in from any computer and your bookmarks are there.

### Features

- **Automatic Syncing** - Add or remove bookmarks and they sync to the server instantly
- **Login Sync** - Join the server and your bookmarks download automatically
- **Manual Sync** - Press F8 or use commands to sync manually
- **Per-Player Storage** - Your bookmarks are yours, stored by your UUID
- **Multi-Server Support** - Works correctly even if you play on multiple servers


### Commands
/jeisync push - Upload your bookmarks to the server

/jeisync pull - Downloads your bookmarks from the server

/jeisync status - Shows how many bookmarks are stored

/jeisync which - Shows which bookmark file is being found (meant for debug purposes)

/jeisync clear - Clears all your server-side bookmarks

### First Time Setup

Install on both **client** AND **server** **(required!)**
On your main computer: /jeisync push
On other computers: Just log in - bookmarks sync and load automatically!


### Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge 21.1.x
- JEI 19.x


### FAQ

Do I need this on the server?

Yes! The mod stores bookmarks on the server

Will it delete my existing bookmarks?

No! The mod won't overwrite your local bookmarks if the server has none. Use /jeisync push 
to upload.

Does it work with modpacks?

Yes! Works great with any modpack that has JEI (Just enough Items)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Made by Saged7
